_comment: Declares which modules X_Ray needs from the Local_LLM mothership.
This copies the listed modules into _mothership/ with imports rewritten.

models.note: Shared data models — HardwareProfile, ModelCategory, QuantizationType, etc.

hardware_detection.note: Zero-dep system profiler — CPU, RAM, GPU, AVX detection.

settings_service.note: JSON settings persistence with deep-merge. Pure stdlib, no rewrites needed.
